# MCP Conformance Tests - Capability Negotiation
# Tests for client and server capability negotiation during initialization

# ============================
# CLIENT CAPABILITIES
# ============================

# TEST 1: Client Declares Capabilities in Initialize Request
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client declares root and sampling capabilities
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}},"clientInfo":{"name":"CapabilityClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'

# Complete initialization
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# TEST 2: Server Must Respect Client Capabilities - Roots
# Server should recognize and use client's roots capability
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"roots/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"roots":'

# TEST 3: Server Must Respect Client Capabilities - Sampling
# Server should recognize and use client's sampling capability
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"sampling/sample","params":{"prompt":"Test prompt","options":{"maxTokens":10}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"completion":'

# TEST 4: Server Must Respect Absence of Client Capabilities
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Client declares no capabilities
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"CapabilityClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'

# Complete initialization
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Request roots capability that wasn't declared (should fail)
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"method":"roots/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"message":"Client does not support roots capability"'

# ============================
# SERVER CAPABILITIES
# ============================

# TEST 5: Server Declares Capabilities in Initialize Response
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=prompts,resources,tools,logging
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Send initialization request
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"CapabilityClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'
stdout '"prompts":'
stdout '"resources":'
stdout '"tools":'
stdout '"logging":'

# Complete initialization
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# TEST 6: Client Must Respect Server Capabilities - Tools
# Server supports tools capability, so this should work
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"method":"tools/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"tools":'

# TEST 7: Client Must Respect Server Capabilities - Prompts
# Server supports prompts capability, so this should work
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"method":"prompts/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"prompts":'

# TEST 8: Client Must Respect Server Capabilities - Resources
# Server supports resources capability, so this should work
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"method":"resources/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"resources":'

# TEST 9: Server Must Support List Changed Capability
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=prompts,resources,tools --list-change-support
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Send initialization request
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":10,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"CapabilityClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'
stdout '"prompts":{"listChanged":true}'
stdout '"resources":{"listChanged":true}'
stdout '"tools":{"listChanged":true}'

# Complete initialization
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# TEST 10: Server Resource Subscribe Capability
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=resources --resource-subscribe
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Send initialization request
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":11,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"CapabilityClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'
stdout '"resources":{"subscribe":true}'

# Complete initialization
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# TEST 11: Client Must Respect Absence of Server Capabilities
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --capabilities=prompts
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Send initialization request
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":12,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"CapabilityClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'
stdout '"prompts":'
! stdout '"tools":'

# Complete initialization
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Request tools capability that wasn't declared (should fail)
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":13,"method":"tools/list"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"error":'
stdout '"message":"Server does not support tools capability"'

# TEST 12: Experimental Capabilities
exec mcp-scripttest-server --stdio --experimental='{"customFeature":{"enabled":true}}'
cmp stderr "MCP server listening on stdio"

# Send initialization request with client experimental capabilities
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":14,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2025-03-26","capabilities":{"experimental":{"clientFeature":{"enabled":true}}},"clientInfo":{"name":"CapabilityClient","version":"1.0.0"}}}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"capabilities":'
stdout '"experimental":{"customFeature":{"enabled":true}}'

# Complete initialization
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio

# Use experimental capability
setstdin {"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":15,"method":"experimental/customFeature"}
exec cat | mcp-send --stdio
stdout '"result":'
stdout '"customFeatureResponse":'
